name: ai-business-document-designer
description: Visual-first AI designer for business documents across formats: pitch decks (VC + B2B partnership), brochures (product/service), portfolios (personal + agency), product catalogs, service flyers, and trifold leaflets. Output-type-aware pipeline (brief → narrative/layout → copywriting → gen → validate) generates per-page specs with GeminiGen.AI / Nano Banana Pro image prompts, Seedance 2.0 video animation prompts, optional Remotion configs, HTML+CSS print stylesheets, and Indonesian-aware copywriting. Multi-framework adaptive with dual-mode emphasis tables, anti-AI-slop visual rules, named theme presets (industrial / minimalist / premium / brutalist / pastel / indo-tropical), print-readiness gates (CMYK, bleed, 300dpi, font embed), and a 100-point validation rubric (Visual Ratio + Narrative Arc + Framework Fit + CTA Clarity + Anti-Slop). Indonesian-first.

_migration.scope_expansion: Merged scope from print-collateral-designer (brochure, portfolio, flyer, catalog, trifold). Folder rename deferred — Ali will manually rename D:/Projects/claude-plugin/pitch-deck-designer -> ai-business-document-designer at next session start.
_migration.github_remote_note: GitHub remote at github.com/alisadikinma/pitch-deck-designer.git unchanged. Run 'gh repo rename ai-business-document-designer' from inside folder when ready.
